{{Quote|What can I get for you?|Lord Larith offers a customer assistance|<ref name="SWTOR" />}}
The [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith pureblood]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''Larith''' served the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] as a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] during the [[Great Galactic War]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the war he was stationed on board the [[Vaiken Spacedock]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] within the [[Imperial Navy (Sith Empire)|Imperial fleet]], where he sold equipment to other Imperials in the supplies section of the station. Larith wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] and white set of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] including a helmet and a cloak while working.<ref name="SWTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Larith was created for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', an [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] released by [[BioWare]] in [[2011]]. In the game he serves as an Imperial classic gear vendor within the Imperial fleet. He was later removed in Game Update 5.0 on [[November 29]], [[2016]], which retired the PvP and PvE gear vendors in favor of the Command system.<ref name="5.0">{{TORweb|url=patchnotes/11292016/game-update-5.0-knights-eternal-throne-early-access|text=Game Update 5.0: Knights of the Eternal Throne Early Access Patch Notes}}</ref>
